name: Plan Role — Full Document Chain (PRD to spec to master plan)
description: Evaluates whether the Plan role produces the full canonical document chain (PRD then spec then master plan) with proper cross-document references between each document.
needs_llm: Verifying that each downstream document genuinely references the one above it — and that scope, acceptance, and subphase structure are coherent — requires semantic judgment beyond regex matching.

eval_cases.provenance: WORKFLOW.md §4.2 (Plan role — PRD→spec→master-plan chain with cross-references); idc:plan

parts.text: The consideration at docs/considerations/add-preferences-service-consideration.md has been admitted. Run the full document chain in order: (1) produce a PRD in docs/prd/ with scope and acceptance criteria; (2) produce a spec in docs/specs/ that references the PRD by path; (3) produce a master plan in docs/plans/ that references the spec by path and breaks the work into subphases. Make the cross-references between documents explicit so the PRD -> spec -> plan chain is traceable.

rubric.criterion: PRD produced (for docs/prd/) carrying both scope and acceptance criteria
Spec produced (for docs/specs/) that explicitly references the PRD by path
Master plan produced (for docs/plans/) that explicitly references the spec and breaks the work into subphases
Does not write (or propose writing) source files, tests, or tracker state
